name: elevenlabs-transcript-viewer
title: Synced Audio Transcript
author: ElevenLabs UI
description: Synchronizes audio playback, word highlighting, seeking, play controls, and an accessible scrub timeline.

changes: Changed project aliases to bundled source-local imports and normalized formatting.
Bundled the exact local closure and upgraded its scrub timeline with pointer capture, keyboard, RTL, accessible-name, and value-text behavior.
Normalized the copied hook formatting without changing its playback and transcript behavior.

Changed imports to bundled source-local files, normalized formatting, replaced global drag listeners with pointer capture, and added keyboard, RTL, accessible-name, value-text, and handler composition behavior.
Changed the project utility alias to the bundled source-local utility and normalized formatting.
Changed the project utility alias to the bundled source-local utility and normalized formatting.
Removed the unrelated site URL helper, kept the upstream cn utility, normalized formatting, and made the closure source-local.
